tagline: A proven 20-year inclusive hair franchise backed by The Riverside Company delivering repeat-revenue unit economics under a semi-absentee owner model.
description_short: Bishops Cuts/Color is a manager-run hair salon franchise founded in 2001 and backed by The Riverside Company through its Head to Toe Brands portfolio. More than 75% of franchisees work under 15 hours per week by hiring a general manager to run daily operations. With 40 open locations and a system-wide estimated average of approximately $542K in annual gross revenue the brand targets growth-minded investors seeking a proven community business in the $60B U.S. haircare market.
market_intelligence_insight: The U.S. hair salon market was valued at approximately $60.6B in 2024 and is projected to grow at 6.5% CAGR through 2032 driven by recurring demand across all demographics; franchise-based salon models hold 58% of market share and haircut services represent 45% of total category revenue on 4 to 8 week repeat visit cycles.
item_19_headline: Top-quartile franchisees averaged $744,416 in annual gross revenue across 40 reporting locations for the 2025 calendar year.
ongoing_support: monthly support calls, KPI training, field support visits, annual marketing calendar, recruiting strategy guide, stylist development, celebrity workshops, vendor education, review management, quarterly reviews, quarterly manager training
